heroSubtitle.goal: I strive to build interfaces that are enjoyable to use.

aboutTitle: Hi, I'm Stepan. Nice to meet you!
aboutText1: Frontend developer with commercial experience. I work in Epam since 2024.
aboutText2: Specialized in developing SPA applications with React. Experienced in hooks, Context API, responsive layout, SCSS, and API integration.
aboutText3: I’m detail-oriented, always learning, and open to new challenges and collaborations. Let’s build something great together!
project1Desc: Interactive quiz application with timer, randomized logic, accessibility support, and responsive UI.
project2Desc: Single-page application integrating with the Marvel Developer API (historical).Demonstrates routing, API integration, and dynamic data rendering.
project4Desc: Full-stack role-based learning management system with authentication.
project5Desc: Role-based movie management platform with admin capabilities.
name: © 2026 Stepan Mateiko
